global_description: A small, sleek bird with a compact body and a distinctive black throat patch. Its plumage is primarily gray with white underparts and a striking black and white facial pattern. The wings and tail are dark with subtle white edging, and it has a short, conical beak.

part_details.throat: Distinctive black patch, contrasting with lighter body colors.
part_details.plumage: Gray on the back and wings, white on the underparts, smooth texture.
part_details.face: Black and white pattern, with a bold black stripe through the eye.
part_details.wings: Dark gray with subtle white edging, streamlined shape.
part_details.beak: Short, conical, adapted for seed eating.

spatial_relations: The black throat patch is centrally located on the chest.
The black and white facial pattern frames the eyes and beak.
The wings are attached to the sides of the body, extending backwards.
